title: Data Analyst
description: Define and maintain KPIs across all active products — covering sales performance, payment conversion, user engagement, and platform usage Own dashboards for internal teams, management, and external stakeholders at appropriate access levels Produce regular reporting cycles and proactively flag deviations from expected performance Analyze user behavior across the full funnel: activation, retention, engagement, and drop-off Analyze payment and conversion flows, including non-standard attribution logic when platform flows require custom measurement approaches Conduct cohort analysis and performance progression tracking across time periods and user segments Identify patterns in operational and support data that point to systemic product or process problems Maintain clean, consistent data across all products and data sources Build and document data definitions and calculation logic so outputs are reproducible and trustworthy by anyone on the team Validate incoming data from partners and institutions before it enters any reporting system Identify and resolve data integrity issues before they reach any stakeholder Answer structured analytical questions from product operations, business development, and management — explaining the logic, not just the output Build focused analyses when a decision needs evidence quickly Participate in pre-implementation scoping — define what data needs to be collected or agreed with a partner before work begins
requirements: 2–4 years Experience in a data analyst role, preferably in a product-led or tech-enabled company. Power BI : Proficient — data modeling, DAX, publishing and maintaining dashboards Excel : Advanced — pivot tables, lookup logic, complex formulas SQL : Working knowledge — can query databases to pull and validate data independently Python : A plus — especially for data cleaning or processing large datasets Analytical Instinct : Catches measurement problems before they become decision problems Languages  Arabic and English fluency — outputs are produced in both

title: Sales & Marketing Data Analyst
description: Analyze sales performance (sell-in / sell-out) across regions, products, and channels to identify key drivers of growth. Track and evaluate campaign performance across digital and offline activities, providing actionable insights. Develop and maintain dashboards and reports to monitor key KPIs (sales, market share, ROI, campaign effectiveness). Identify trends, opportunities, and performance gaps to support data-driven decision-making. Support forecasting and demand planning using historical data and market trends. Collaborate closely with marketing and sales teams to optimize performance and improve business outcomes. Consolidate and validate data from multiple sources (sales systems, digital platforms, field feedback) to ensure accuracy and consistency.
requirements: 2–5 years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or a related field. Advanced proficiency in Excel and experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI or similar). Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights. Experience working with sales and/or marketing data is a strong advantage. Attention to detail and strong problem-solving skills.
description_clean: analyze sales performance sell in sell out across regions products and channels to identify key drivers of growth. track and evaluate campaign performance across digital and offline activities providing actionable insights. develop and maintain dashboards and reports to monitor key kpis sales market share roi campaign effectiveness . identify trends opportunities and performance gaps to support data driven decision making. support forecasting and demand planning using historical data and market trends. collaborate closely with marketing and sales teams to optimize performance and improve business outcomes. consolidate and validate data from multiple sources sales systems digital platforms field feedback to ensure accuracy and consistency. 2 5 years of experience in data analysis business intelligence or a related field. advanced proficiency in excel and experience with data visualization tools e.g. power bi or similar . strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate complex data into clear actionable insights. experience working with sales and or marketing data is a strong advantage. attention to detail and strong problem solving skills.

title: Senior Technical Business Analyst
description: We’re Hiring | Senior Technical Business Analyst – Travel Tech, API Connectivity & AI At BEDINROOM , we are building a cloud-native hotel distribution and booking platform designed for scale, intelligence, and real travel-tech complexity. This is not a traditional Business Analyst role. We are looking for a Senior Technical Business Analyst who can stand between business ambition and technical reality, translating complex hotel distribution, booking, API, and AI requirements into clear product and engineering specifications. The role will support the foundation stage of our platform, including hotel booking flows, supplier connectivity, room mapping, B2B/B2C journeys, affiliate tracking, and AI-powered travel experiences. Key Responsibilities: Define product and technical requirements for hotel booking, distribution, and management workflows Analyze hotel supplier APIs, channel manager integrations, OTA flows, and booking lifecycle logic Create clear BRDs, PRDs, user stories, process maps, sequence diagrams, and API requirement documents Work with stakeholders, architects, and future engineering teams to define scalable system logic Support the design of AI-powered features including semantic search, RAG flows, AI booking agents, and automated room/content mapping Document JSON/XML mapping requirements for availability, rates, inventory, bookings, cancellations, and modifications Help design booking consistency flows including soft holds, payment confirmation, cancellation rules, idempotency, and double-booking prevention Support B2B, B2C, white-label, extranet, prepaid wallet, credit limit, invoicing, and affiliate tracking requirements Assist in defining MVP scope, implementation roadmap, dashboards, reporting, and operational workflows
requirements: 5+ years of experience as a Business Analyst, Technical Business Analyst, Technical Product Owner, or similar role Proven experience in hospitality tech, travel tech, hotel booking platforms, OTAs, channel managers, PMS, CRS, GDS, ERP, or SaaS platforms Strong understanding of software development lifecycle and Agile delivery Strong ability to write technical and functional documentation for engineering teams Hands-on understanding of REST/SOAP APIs, JSON/XML payloads, Postman, Swagger, or similar tools Good understanding of booking engines, hotel inventory, rate plans, cancellation policies, taxes, payment flows, and customer journeys Ability to work with scalable systems, cloud-based platforms, dashboards, integrations, and reporting structures Strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder management skills Preferred Background Travel Tech Hospitality Tech Hotel Booking Engines Channel Managers OTA Integrations PMS / CRS / GDS Systems SaaS Platforms API Connectivity Room Mapping / Content Deduplication Affiliate Tracking AI-powered digital platforms Nice to Have Knowledge of OpenTravel Alliance OTA XML or HTNG standards Experience with SiteMinder, Cloudbeds, DerbySoft, RateGain, or similar platforms Understanding of AI concepts such as LLMs, RAG, semantic search, vector databases, prompt engineering, or AI agents Basic SQL knowledge and ability to analyze system data or logs Experience with tools such as Jira, Azure DevOps, Confluence, Postman, Swagger, Datadog, Splunk, or similar

title: Credit Analyst
description: Responsible for assessing customers’ creditworthiness by analyzing financial data. analyzing credit history, and risk indicators to support lending decisions. Reviews loan applications, ensures compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements, and recommends approvals or rejections. Monitors portfolio performance and identifies potential risks to maintain a healthy loan portfolio.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or related field. 1–3 years of experience in credit analysis, preferably in consumer finance. Strong analytical and financial assessment skills. Good knowledge of credit policies, risk assessment, and FRA regulations. Proficiency in Microsoft Excel. Strong attention to detail and decision-making ability Good communication skills (Arabic & English)

title: Data Analyst
description: Design, build, and maintain interactive dashboards and automated reporting solutions using Power BI or Tableau Analyze large and complex datasets to identify trends, patterns, and actionable insights Develop and optimize advanced SQL queries for efficient data extraction and transformation Build, maintain, and optimize ETL / ELT processes and data pipelines Perform advanced data cleaning, transformation, and validation to ensure data quality Work closely with stakeholders to translate business requirements into data solutions Contribute to data modeling and structuring datasets (fact/dimension tables, relationships) Support the development and maintenance of data warehouses and data marts Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, external systems) Automate repetitive reporting and data workflows to improve efficiency Monitor data performance and troubleshoot data-related issues Support business functions with forecasting, KPI tracking, and performance analysis Collect and consolidate data from the marketing team and deliver required marketing insights and outputs
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Business Analytics, or a related field 2–3 years of strong hands-on experience in Data Analysis or a similar role Advanced proficiency in SQL Strong experience with Power BI or Tableau (including data modeling and DAX) Solid understanding of ETL / ELT processes, data pipelines, and data workflows Strong knowledge of data modeling Experience in data transformation, data cleaning, and handling large datasets Advanced Excel skills (Power Query, complex formulas, data manipulation) Basic knowledge of Python for data analysis (Pandas, NumPy) Experience working with APIs and integrating multiple data sources Ability to calculate and analyze ROI (Return on Investment) to support business and marketing decisions

title: Data Analyst
description: * Collect, analyze, and interpret data to support business decisions * Develop dashboards, reports, and performance metrics * Identify trends, insights, and opportunities for improvement * Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support strategic initiatives * Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and reporting efficiency
requirements: * 2–4 years of experience in data analysis or business intelligence * Strong knowledge of Excel, SQL, Power BI, or Tableau * Experience with data visualization and reporting tools * Strong analytical and problem-solving skills * Excellent attention to detail and communication skills * Experience in pharmaceutical or healthcare industries is a plus

title: Materials Planning & Support Analyst
description: Operational KPI Analysis: Analyze core metrics such as Stock Cover (for consumables/spare parts), Service Levels for internal departments, and Consumption Forecast Accuracy. Inventory Optimization: Use data to determine safety stock levels for critical materials (e.g., additives, packaging materials, industrial gases) to avoid operational downtime. Usage Forecasting: Analyze historical consumption patterns of supporting materials to predict future needs and support better procurement decisions. Operational Alignment: Act as the primary liaison between Commercial, Procurement, Logistics, and Warehouse teams to resolve material availability issues. Conflict Resolution: Work with the maintenance and operations teams to prioritize the procurement of urgent spares or consumables that impact plant reliability. Supplier Coordination: Support procurement by providing data on lead times and supplier performance to improve the overall reliability of the supply chain. Process Enhancement: Support improvements in the material requisition process and system enhancements within the ERP to automate replenishment. AI & Digital Planning: Participate in initiatives to use AI/Digital tools for predictive maintenance planning and automated inventory tracking. Waste Reduction: Identify opportunities to reduce excess inventory or obsolete stock through better data visibility and process auditing. Supply Risk Reporting: Prepare updates for management on supply risks, potential material shortages, and the status of critical industrial inventory. Exception Reporting: Maintain reports that highlight deviations from standard consumption rates or stock-out risks for supporting materials. Material Readiness: Ensure all materials required for planned maintenance (turnarounds) or daily operations are staged and ready.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Logistics, or Business with a focus on Supply Chain 3–15 years in material planning or supply chain planning Advanced Excel (Pivot Tables, Power Query) and Data Visualization (Power BI/Tableau) to track material flows. Experience with ERP Material Management (MM) modules (e.g., SAP or Oracle). Industrial Knowledge: Familiarity with the technical materials used in petrochemical operations (valves, gaskets, additives, specialized packaging). Soft Skills: Strong coordination skills to manage the needs of diverse departments like Maintenance, Production, and Finance. The position will be based in Port Said, Egypt

title: Business Analyst
employment_type: Full Time, On-site, Horizon Operation and Management
description: Assist in market research and data collection in Egypt/Middle East property market, sort out industry trends, policy and competition information. Analyze market data and business performance, provide data support for marketing and business development strategies. Prepare commercial quotation proposals for new project market expansion Assist in sorting out client and project data, maintain business development ledgers and update progress Support business negotiation and project follow-up, collect and organize relevant business materials. Monitor industry and policy changes, feedback key information and assist in strategy adjustment. Fulfill additional tasks as assigned by leaders.
requirements: 1-2 years of working experience in property management is preferred; with basic understanding of the Egypt and Middle East market. Prior experience in data analysis in the Middle East (Egypt) is preferred; with basic knowledge of the local property management industry. Bachelor’s degree required; majors in Financial Management, Data Analysis and other related disciplines are preferred. Good communication, careful; able to complete tasks independently under guidance. Proficient in Office; capable of data sorting, simple marketing report and document writing. Excellent English & Arabic bilingual skills; able to draft documents and conduct bilingual negotiations preferred.

title: Financial Analyst
description: Are you a driven financial expert ready to make a significant impact? We are seeking an exceptional Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team on-site in Cairo, Egypt . This is an incredible opportunity for an experienced professional to elevate their career, shape strategic financial decisions, and contribute directly to our growth story. About the Role: As our Financial Analyst, you will be at the heart of our financial operations, transforming data into actionable insights. You will collaborate with various departments, providing critical financial guidance that drives performance and supports strategic initiatives. We are looking for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, possesses sharp analytical skills, and is passionate about uncovering opportunities for efficiency and profitability. Key Responsibilities: Lead comprehensive financial analysis , including budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis to drive business performance. Develop sophisticated financial models to support strategic planning, investment decisions, and new initiatives. Prepare detailed financial reports, presentations, and dashboards for senior management, highlighting key trends and recommendations. Conduct in-depth market research and competitive analysis to identify industry trends and potential risks or opportunities. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to optimize financial processes and ensure accurate financial reporting. Provide crucial support for annual budget cycles and long-range financial planning. Analyze profitability, cost structures, and operational efficiency, proposing data-driven solutions. Skills & Technologies You'll Master (or Already Possess!): Deep expertise in Finance and Financial Analysis principles. Proven ability in Financial Modeling , Budgeting , and Forecasting . Strong proficiency in Data Analysis and advanced use of Microsoft Excel . Familiarity with database querying tools like SQL is a plus. Excellent Communication Skills and ability to articulate complex financial concepts clearly. Superior Problem-Solving abilities and a proactive approach to challenges. Experience with Investment Analysis and broader market research methodologies. Growth Opportunities: This role is designed for growth! You'll be continuously challenged, working on high-impact projects that will expand your financial acumen and strategic thinking. We foster a culture of learning and professional development, offering clear pathways to senior analyst roles, managerial positions, and specialized financial leadership opportunities within our growing organization. Our Team & Culture: Join a collaborative, supportive, and intellectually curious team where your insights are valued. We champion an environment of open communication, mutual respect, and a shared commitment to excellence. Located on-site in vibrant Cairo, Egypt , you’ll be part of a local team making a global difference. Impact You'll Make: Your work will be instrumental in guiding our financial strategy, optimizing resource allocation, and ensuring sustainable growth. You will directly influence key business decisions, helping to navigate market dynamics and secure our financial future. This is your chance to leave a lasting mark!
requirements: Experience that Ignites: A minimum of 3-7 years of progressive experience in Financial Analysis or a closely related role, demonstrating a track record of success and increasing responsibility. Academic Excellence: A Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics , or a related quantitative field. An advanced degree or relevant professional certifications (e.g., CFA) are a significant advantage. Mastery of Tools: Exceptional proficiency in Financial Analysis, Financial Modeling, Budgeting, and Forecasting . Advanced skills in Microsoft Excel are non-negotiable. Analytical Prowess: Strong capabilities in Data Analysis, Investment Analysis, and Market Research . Experience with SQL or other data manipulation tools is highly desirable. Soft Skills that Shine: Outstanding Communication Skills , both written and verbal, with the ability to present complex financial data clearly and concisely. A natural Problem-Solving mindset is essential. Career Level: This is an Experienced level role, perfect for a motivated professional ready to take on significant responsibilities and contribute strategically from day one.

title: Financial Analyst
employment_type: Full Time, On-site, Al Ahly Medical Company
description: Are you a highly motivated and analytical finance professional ready to make a significant impact? Join our dynamic team in Giza, Egypt as a Financial Analyst ! We are seeking an experienced individual with a passion for numbers and a keen eye for detail to drive financial insights and support strategic decision-making in an on-site capacity. Overview: As a Financial Analyst, you will be at the heart of our financial operations, transforming complex data into actionable intelligence. You'll play a crucial role in our continued growth, contributing directly to our financial health and future success. This is an exciting opportunity to apply your expertise in a challenging yet rewarding environment. Responsibilities: Conduct in-depth financial data analysis , identifying trends, opportunities, and potential risks. Prepare and analyze comprehensive financial statements and detailed financial reporting for various stakeholders. Develop and manage budgets, forecasts, and financial models to support business planning. Perform variance analysis to explain actual vs. planned results and recommend corrective actions. Support strategic planning initiatives through robust financial modeling and scenario analysis. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather financial data and provide insightful recommendations. Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal policies. Skills & Technologies: You will leverage your expertise in Finance , advanced Financial Data Analysis techniques, and your proficiency in preparing accurate Financial Statements and compelling Financial Reporting . A strong command of tools like Microsoft Excel and Power BI is essential, alongside a deep understanding of accounting principles like IFRS . Your strategic thinking and communication skills will be key to your success. Growth Opportunities: We are committed to your professional development! You will have access to ongoing training, mentorship, and opportunities to lead critical financial projects. As an experienced professional, you'll be empowered to take ownership and shape your career path within our growing organization. Team & Culture: Join a collaborative and supportive team that values innovation, precision, and proactive problem-solving. Our culture fosters an environment where your contributions are recognized and your expertise is celebrated. We believe in working hard, supporting each other, and achieving great things together. Impact: Your work will directly influence strategic decisions, optimize financial performance, and contribute to the overall success and stability of the company. You will be instrumental in providing the financial clarity needed to navigate market dynamics and achieve our ambitious goals.
requirements: Unleash Your Potential: We are looking for an Experienced Financial Analyst ready to hit the ground running! Required Skills: Proven expertise in Finance and advanced Financial Data Analysis . Demonstrated ability to prepare and interpret complex Financial Statements and produce accurate Financial Reporting . Possession of a Certified Management Accountant (CMA) certification is highly advantageous. Strong background in Budgeting , Forecasting , and Variance Analysis . Exceptional proficiency in Microsoft Excel and experience with data visualization tools like Power BI . Solid understanding of accounting principles (e.g. IFRS ). Excellent Strategic Planning and problem-solving abilities. Superior Communication Skills , both written and verbal, to articulate complex financial information clearly. Experience Requirements: A minimum of 3-7 years of progressive experience in a Financial Analyst or similar role. Career Level Expectations: This role is perfect for an Experienced professional eager to take on significant responsibilities and drive impactful financial strategies.

title: Supply Chain data Analyst
employment_type: Full Time, On-site, Dora Management Solutions
description: Analyze supply chain data to identify trends, inefficiencies, and opportunities for process improvement. Monitor inventory levels and coordinate with procurement and logistics teams to ensure optimal stock availability. Develop and maintain supply chain performance metrics and dashboards for management reporting. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to streamline order fulfillment and distribution processes. Support the implementation of supply chain strategies to reduce costs and enhance service levels. Prepare detailed reports and presentations on supply chain performance, risks, and recommendations. Assist in demand forecasting and capacity planning to align supply with business needs. Evaluate supplier performance and participate in vendor selection and relationship management. Ensure compliance with company policies, industry regulations, and quality standards throughout the supply chain. Identify and resolve supply chain disruptions or bottlenecks to maintain smooth operations.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Logistics, or a related field. 3 to 6 years of experience in supply chain analysis, logistics, or a related discipline. Proven ability to analyze large datasets and draw actionable insights. Strong knowledge of supply chain processes, inventory management, and logistics operations. Proficiency with supply chain management software and advanced Excel skills. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for cross-functional collaboration. Demonstrated problem-solving abilities and attention to detail. Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced, office-based environment. Experience preparing reports and presenting findings to management. Familiarity with ERP systems and data visualization tools is a plus.

title: Senior Financial Analyst
description: Key responsibilities for this role include: Leading the development and maintenance of advanced financial models for budgeting, forecasting, and long-term financial planning Performing in-depth financial analysis to evaluate business performance, profitability, and strategic initiatives Providing clear, actionable financial insights and presenting findings to senior management and key stakeholders Driving variance analysis and identifying risks, opportunities, and improvement areas Partnering with cross-functional teams to support strategic planning and business decisions Supporting investment evaluations, business cases, and scenario analysis Enhancing financial reporting processes and improving analytical tools and dashboards Mentoring junior analysts and reviewing their work for accuracy and quality
requirements: We are seeking candidates with 5 to 8 years of experience who meet the following qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field (Master’s degree is a plus) Proven experience in financial modeling, forecasting, budgeting, and performance analysis Strong background in financial analysis and decision support across complex business environments Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to translate complex financial data into clear business insights Strong knowledge of financial statements, cash flow analysis, and financial controls Advanced Excel skills; experience with Power BI, ERP systems, or financial planning tools is highly desirable Professional certifications such as CFA, CPA, or ACCA are a strong advantage

title: Finance analyst
description: Are you a driven and analytical finance professional ready to make a significant impact? We are seeking a talented Finance Analyst to join our dynamic team. title: Data Analyst
description: Job Title:  Data Analyst Location: Misrata, Liby Industry: Manufacturing Employment Type: Full-time We are hiring a Data Analyst to support the marketing team through data analysis and reporting. The role focuses on analyzing marketing campaigns, customer behavior, and sales performance to generate actionable insights that improve marketing effectiveness and business growth. Job Responsibilities ⁠Collect, clean, and validate data from CRM, ERP, Google Analytics, and social media platforms ⁠Analyze marketing campaigns (digital and offline) and measure performance ⁠  ⁠Track KPIs such as leads, conversion rates, ROI, CAC, and customer retention ⁠  ⁠Prepare dashboards and reports (weekly, monthly, quarterly) ⁠  ⁠Conduct segmentation analysis (customers, regions, products, channels) ⁠  ⁠Identify trends, risks, and growth opportunities ⁠  ⁠Support market research, competitor analysis, and pricing analysis ⁠  ⁠Assist in demand forecasting and evaluating marketing impact on sales ⁠  ⁠Collaborate with marketing, sales, and finance teams
requirements: Job Requirements Education & Experience ⁠  ⁠Bachelor’s degree in Data Analysis, Statistics, Marketing, Economics, or related field ⁠  ⁠3+ years of experience in data analysis or marketing analytics ⁠  ⁠Experience with ERP/CRM systems (Odoo is a plus) Technical Skills ⁠Strong Excel skills (advanced formulas, Power Query, Pivot Tables) ⁠  ⁠Experience with BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker, etc.) ⁠  ⁠Basic to intermediate SQL knowledge ⁠  ⁠Familiar with Google Analytics, Meta Ads, and CRM systems

title: PMO Data Analyst (Resource & Scenario Planning)
employment_type: Full Time, Hybrid, RISEUP (Endemag for Administrative Skills Development)
description: On behalf of our leading multinational client, we are looking to hire: Job Title for the new hire: RSP Scenario Planner Job Description: Manage and update data within the RSP scenario generation tool in line with guidance provided Expected deliverables: The contractor will be responsible for delivering a structured programme of quality investigations across the Source Based Project Management list throughout the eight-month engagement. Key outputs and expectations are defined as follows. The contractor will conduct regular and systematic reviews of data held within RSP Resource Planner, Source Quick Suite, and the Planner Insight Reporting System, identifying errors, inconsistencies, and anomalies across project records. All findings must be clearly documented, categorised by severity, and communicated back to the relevant stakeholder teams in a timely manner. Where dashboard support is required, the contractor will contribute to the build and ongoing maintenance of reporting dashboards within Quick Suite, ensuring outputs are accurate, accessible, and aligned to the needs of the PMO, labour planning team, and OPT. The contractor will maintain a live error log throughout the engagement, tracking identified issues, resolution status, and any recurring patterns that may indicate systemic data quality concerns. Regular progress updates will be provided to key partners across PMO, internal labour planning, OPT, and tech teams. By the end of the engagement, the contractor will produce a consolidated quality findings report summarising key issues identified, resolutions applied, and recommendations for ongoing data governance.
requirements: Required qualifications/certifications: The ideal candidate will hold a bachelor’s degree in Data Analytics, Information Systems, Business Administration, Project Management , or a related field. A Project Management Professional (PMP) certification is strongly preferred and will be weighted heavily during selection, as it is the most recognized project management credential within multinational and PMO-aligned environments in Egypt. PRINCE2 Foundation or Practitioner will also be considered as an alternative, though PMP is the preferred standard for this engagement. Candidates must demonstrate proven experience working with reporting and planning systems, with practical familiarity operating within resource planning tools and data visualization platforms. Experience building and maintaining dashboards within suite-based project management or reporting tools is essential. A certification in data analytics or business intelligence, such as Microsoft Power BI, Tableau Desktop Specialist, Google Data Analytics Certificate, or IBM Data Analyst Professional Certificate , is required. Proficiency in Microsoft Excel to an advanced level is also expected, including the use of pivot tables, lookups, and data validation techniques. Strong capability in data analysis, error identification, root cause analysis, and structured reporting is required. Candidates with exposure to PMO frameworks or workforce planning environments will be prioritised. Familiarity with quality assurance methodologies such as Six Sigma Yellow or Green Belt is desirable but not mandatory. Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English are required. The candidate must be based in Egypt and available to commit to the full 1-year contract duration. Software / programs / tools: RSP / EXCEL / WORD Required years of Experience: 3 years Technical Assessment Needed: Yes
